title: pteridium latiusculum subsp. pinetorum
intro: Pteridium latiusculum subsp. pinetorum, also known as fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Dennstaedtiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pteridium latiusculum subsp. pinetorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, which are often used to treat various health issues, such as eczema, acne, and minor cuts and scrapes.
